user_stories.title: Schema files define hook contracts
user_stories.i_want: JSON schema files that define the exact structure of each state.json subsystem
user_stories.so_that: hooks and agents have a single source of truth for field names, types, and required fields
acceptance_criteria: AC-01: 8 schema files exist in src/claude/hooks/config/schemas/
AC-01a: Each schema uses JSON Schema draft-07 format
AC-01b: Each schema has $id, title, description, type, properties, required fields

user_stories.title: Gate-blocker uses canonical field names
user_stories.i_want: gate-blocker.cjs to read the canonical field names that I write to state.json
user_stories.so_that: gates are not falsely blocked when I write valid constitutional validation and elicitation data
acceptance_criteria: AC-02: gate-blocker reads constitutional_validation.completed (boolean) and iterations_used (number)
AC-02a: gate-blocker reads interactive_elicitation.final_selection (string)
AC-02b: gate-blocker does NOT read final_status or total_iterations (removed)
AC-02c: Tests verify gate passes with canonical fields and blocks with missing fields

user_stories.title: Shared schema validator in common.cjs
user_stories.i_want: a validateSchema(data, schemaId) function in common.cjs
user_stories.so_that: all hooks can validate state data against schemas without duplicating validation logic
acceptance_criteria: AC-03: validateSchema returns { valid: true } for valid data
AC-03a: validateSchema returns { valid: false, errors: [...] } for invalid data
AC-03b: validateSchema returns { valid: true } when schema file is missing (fail-open)
AC-03c: validateSchema uses no external npm dependencies
AC-03d: validateSchema completes in < 5ms

user_stories.title: Hooks validate state before processing
user_stories.i_want: hooks to validate state data against schemas before making decisions
user_stories.so_that: malformed state data is detected early and hooks fail-open rather than crash
acceptance_criteria: AC-04: gate-blocker validates constitutional_validation, interactive_elicitation, test_iteration
AC-04a: constitution-validator validates constitutional_validation
AC-04b: iteration-corridor validates test_iteration and constitutional_validation
AC-04c: menu-tracker validates interactive_elicitation
AC-04d: test-watcher validates test_iteration
AC-04e: All hooks log validation errors via debugLog
AC-04f: All hooks fail-open on validation errors (allow action)

user_stories.title: Documentation for hook API contracts
user_stories.i_want: a documentation file listing every hook's stdin/stdout contract and state.json fields
user_stories.so_that: I know exactly what JSON to write to state.json for hooks to work correctly
acceptance_criteria: AC-07: docs/isdlc/hooks-api-contract.md exists
AC-07a: Documents all 11 hooks with trigger type, matcher, stdin schema, stdout behavior
AC-07b: Documents all state.json subsystem schemas with field descriptions
AC-07c: Includes valid examples for each subsystem

user_stories.title: Agent instructions use canonical field names
user_stories.i_want: orchestrator and phase agent instructions to reference the canonical field names
user_stories.so_that: I write the correct fields to state.json and gates pass without false blocks
acceptance_criteria: AC-08: sdlc.md references canonical field names in state.json examples
AC-08a: No references to final_status or total_iterations remain in agent markdown files
AC-08b: constitution-validator.cjs block message shows canonical field names

user_stories.title: All existing tests still pass
user_stories.i_want: all 641 existing tests to continue passing after the changes
user_stories.so_that: the field name cleanup does not introduce regressions
acceptance_criteria: AC-05: npm test passes with 0 failures
AC-05a: ESM test suite (302 tests) passes
AC-05b: CJS test suite (284+ tests) passes
AC-05c: Characterization tests (42 tests) pass
AC-05d: E2E tests (13 tests) pass

user_stories.title: New tests for schema validation
user_stories.i_want: new tests that cover the schema validation logic and canonical field usage
user_stories.so_that: future changes to field names or schemas are caught by tests
acceptance_criteria: AC-06: Tests for validateSchema function (valid, invalid, missing schema, type mismatches)
AC-06a: Tests for each schema file (one valid fixture, one invalid fixture per schema)
AC-06b: Tests for gate-blocker with canonical fields (pass scenario)
AC-06c: Tests for gate-blocker with missing required fields (fail-open scenario)
AC-06d: Tests for gate-blocker with old field names (should fail, not recognized)
